answers: Food safety basics: wash hands, separate raw/cooked foods, cook to proper temperatures, refrigerate within 2 hours.
Storage: meat stays good 3-5 days in fridge, cooked food 3-4 days. When in doubt, throw it out.
Prevent food poisoning: cook chicken to 165°F, don't thaw food on counter, wash produce, and clean cutting boards.
Khabar safety: haat dhoe khao, raw ar cooked alag rakho, fridge e time moto rakho, ar purano khabar na khao.
